title: fix(deps): update module github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2 to v2.3.6

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rootless-containers/rootlesskit (github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2)</summary>

### [`v2.3.6`](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/tag/v2.3.6)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/compare/v2.3.5...v2.3.6)

##### Changes

- \[release/2.3] go.mod: github.com/containernetworking/plugins v1.9.0 ; release v2.3.6 ([#​550](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/550))

##### Install

```
mkdir -p ~/bin
curl -sSL https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/download/v2.3.6/rootlesskit-$(uname -m).tar.gz | tar Cxzv ~/bin
```

##### About the binaries

The binaries were built automatically on GitHub Actions.
See the log to verify SHA256SUMS.
<https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/actions/runs/20323329446>
The sha256sum of the SHA256SUMS file itself is d8abffca38ffdfdd5f8ce62b1f489b5dfecbc68b8972f0889f1c7f1186d1029c .

</details>
